next_step.current_state: Inbox request asks to locate a specific bill and confirm bank transfer completion. Need evidence from the referenced finance record before deciding if completion is possible.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read matching finance bill file for 2026-02-28 EUR 22
Check whether transfer status is recorded in-file
If status missing/external, report unsupported without mutations
next_step.observation: Inbox item requests: locate bill for 深圳市海云电子 dated 2026-02-28 amount EUR 22 and confirm once bank transfer has completed.

next_step.current_state: Located the exact bill file and validated vendor/date/amount. Need to verify whether transfer completion is recorded anywhere locally before concluding unsupported external confirmation.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search workspace for this bill_id/payment status
If no local completion record, report unsupported (bank transfer confirmation requires external banking capability)
Leave inbox item undeleted due incomplete/unsupported request
next_step.observation: Read the target bill and confirmed it matches: counterparty 深圳市海云电子, purchased_on 2026-02-28, total_eur 22.

next_step.current_state: Need to ensure lane-specific rules in 50_finance are applied before final decision; then verify if any local payment-completion record exists.

next_step.current_state: Read finance lane rules. Need nested purchases rules and check for any local transfer-completion record before choosing unsupported.
next_step.observation: 50_finance/AGENTS.MD emphasizes financial exactness and not inferring authorization from casual requests.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Original task was to process the oldest inbox message. I identified oldest file 00_inbox/528_next-task.md, read it, and executed its request as far as supported: located the exact bill record by matching counterparty/date/amount (深圳市海云电子, 2026-02-28, EUR 22) in 50_finance/purchases/2026_02_28__eur_000022__bill__house_mesh_esp32_topup.md. Completeness check: search for bill_id found only that file, no local payment-status record. Capability check: confirming completed bank transfer requires external banking/payment system access, which sandbox tools do not provide. Therefore task cannot be fully completed; per workflow, no mutations and inbox item remains.
next_step.observation: No local record of transfer completion exists for the requested bill, and sandbox has no external bank-status capability.

function.message: Älteste Inbox-Nachricht geprüft: Die angefragte Rechnung wurde gefunden (50_finance/purchases/2026_02_28__eur_000022__bill__house_mesh_esp32_topup.md; 深圳市海云电子, 2026-02-28, EUR 22). Den Abschluss der Banküberweisung kann ich hier jedoch nicht bestätigen, da dafür externer Bank-/Zahlungsstatus nötig ist, auf den die Sandbox keinen Zugriff hat.
function.rulebook_notes: Identity bootstrap completed (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context). Followed inbox workflow for lowest filename and non-mutation on non-doable requests.
function.outcome_justification: Unsupported-capability rule applies: task requires confirming a bank transfer completion, which needs external financial system access not available via local filesystem tools. Evidence from inbox request and bill file confirms target document but not payment completion status.
